reason: The locked detector-independent collector failed closed before emitting a collection record because the frozen golden checkout contained a non-regular Git symlink outside the declared eligible source-file class. Correct handling requires a collector implementation change after golden source access.

disposition.next_cycle: A fresh cycle must use an updated pre-source collector contract, a complete historical exclusion union, fresh metadata-only selection, and new immutable manifests before source access.

public_claim_boundary: This record makes no precision, recall, detector, or release-performance claim.
